description: BlaBlaCar operates ride-sharing and mobility services, including the BlaBlaCar Daily commuting product. Its documented partner API allows partners to search available BlaBlaCar Daily rides and pricing for given routes and times.
summary: BlaBlaCar exposes one documented developer surface: the BlaBlaCar Daily Partner REST API at `https://partners.blablacardaily.com`, authenticated with a partner-issued access token passed as the `access_token` query parameter; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
